name: Noah Fye
comment: Worked with Kevin when he photographed our leadership team's headshots at a summit, and he delivered above and beyond our expectations! He got more than 40 people done in less than one workday, to the tune of rave reviews from all the participants. Turnaround time for the edited images was less than a week, and came in multiple size options. Highly recommend partnering with Get aHead Shot, their great prices and amazing final results are perfect for any company in need of quality shots and a uniform look to elevate their brand.

name: Marcele Viana
comment: Very professional, delicate and directive all at the same time. Great professional!

name: Don Borchert
comment: Kevin was great to work with, gave authentic feedback, and gave me a great headshot!

name: Ying Wang
comment: The photographer is very kind in explaining how to take a confident headshot.

name: Ray Khuo
comment: Terrific experience! Kevin’s approach and technique are assuring and puts you at ease to take your best photos. Highly recommend you schedule time him and see for yourself.

name: Carrie Awad
comment: Fantastic interaction and support to ensure  you get the shot, and clear guidance on best practices for headshots

name: Jing Zheng
comment: I had such a fun and interesting experience with Kevin at Get Ahead Shot! He has a way of making you feel completely at ease in front of the camera, which is not always easy! I really appreciated that he didn’t rush the process at all. We took a ton of pictures, and he gave me the time and space to relax and try different looks. Highly recommend Kevin if you want a professional yet enjoyable photo session! Oh, if you need makeup and styling, Kevin has a wonderful and talented makeup artist, Mallory who can work with you on-site.

name: Laurie Tarpey
comment: Kevin took almost 100 shots during our session. I have always hated having my picture taken. But the experience with Kevin was fun and relaxing. The photos are by far the best I've had taken of me. I highly recommend Kevin.

name: Kenny Moss
comment: Kevin does a GREAT job!  I am very pleased with my headshot.  It increased my confidence ten-fold in my LinkedIn page.  Great job!  Highly recommended.

name: Antoniela Castellar Arrieta
comment: Kevin has that magic and beautiful energy that makes you feel welcome. He guides you with patience, care, kindness, to take you to another world where you are the star, you shine, and the magic happens, with his lens, camera, tech tools, he captures that moment, that story. Thank you kevin

name: Huber Parsons
comment: Excellent photos! Kevin is an expert at getting an amazing head shot. He's friendly, has all the right equipment, and made the process stress-free.

name: Jody Toser
comment: Kevin Elwell is the consummate professional! For my headshot, he expertly guided me to shots and angles that were flattering and reflected my personality all at once. I highly recommend him and his services!

name: Arcelious Joyner
comment: Kevin is the best! His Photography style, personality and experience not only created the best photos I’ve ever taken, it was a session that involved learning more about the craft, technology  and myself. Great work!!!

name: Grady Lincalis
comment: Session with Kevin was fun and easy - happy to finally have a professional head shot. Likely the best pictures ever taken of me - all credit to Kevin!

name: Antoine
comment:
I can’t recommend Kevin at Get A Headshot enough. He is an outstanding professional photographer with not only a top-tier studio and high-end equipment, but—most importantly—the eye and instinct to capture the details that truly make a difference.

Kevin takes the time to really understand what you need and who you are, making sure your personality shines through in your headshot. It’s not just about taking a good picture—it’s about capturing you at your absolute best.

I first worked with Kevin three years ago and was so impressed by the results and the overall experience that I came back again this month. The consistency, quality, and professionalism are unmatched.

Let’s be honest—who doesn’t need a photo that reflects them on their best day, with authenticity and confidence? A great headshot can elevate all your professional interactions, and Kevin is the one to make that happen.

name: Janell Wheeler
comment: Kevin made the whole process easy, and the headshots turned out amazing!

name: Bruce Ladino
comment: Kevin is a full service shop, from capturing the photograph that makes you look best, to electronic delivery, to editing and final prints in multiple configurations.  In my case he even handled wardrobe, because I wore a distracting shirt for the photo shoot, and he was able to edit it to a solid.  You won't be disappointed!

name: C Swanson
comment: WOW!!!  I am VERY pleased with the headshots Kevin provided.  He is truly a master at his craft and very professional.  Once I booked on line, he contacted me same day and we were able to discuss what I was needing.  His studio is in his home and you are met with a "Welcome sign" addressed to you in the parking lot...just a bit of a fun personalized touch.  He also provided the photos ahead of schedule!  Look no further if you are needing a headshot!

name: Kimberley Byrum
comment: I personally would love to refer Kevin Elwell for your next professional headshot.   He made the experience very easy from start to finish.   Thank you, Kevin.

name: ane lane
comment: Such a great photographer

name: Matthew Chen
comment: Great experience! I enjoyed taking headshot photos quickly and smoothly without any issues.

name: Lanqing
comment: Take excellent pics!

name: Patricia Jackson
comment: This was an amazing experience! Once you reach a certain age, taking photos can be stressful but I laughed so much during this session you would have thought we were old friends. Kevin listened to my suggestions even though in hindsight some were pretty ridiculous.  The end result was amazing. 70 never looked so good!

name: Michael Bubulka
comment: This was an amazing experience!   Kevin did a fantastic job and the results are fantastic!  If you need a head shot go see Kevin!

name: Al Casper
comment: Extremely professional, friendly and incredible quality!  highly recommend.

name: Jeffrey Kendall Sapp
comment:
When you step into Kevin Elwell's studio, you’re not just entering a space for a photo session. You're stepping into an environment of professionalism and expertise that can transform a simple photo session into an empowering experience. Kevin's unique talent allows him to capture not just an image, but the essence of his subjects. His ability to make you feel at ease and his keen eye result in photos that are not just headshots, but powerful statements.
I’ve had the privilege of working with many professionals in various fields, and I can say with absolute authority that Kevin’s work stands out. His unwavering attention to detail, dedication to his craft, and genuine passion for bringing out the best in people are second to none. Anyone looking to elevate their personal or professional brand should look no further than Kevin Elwell. I wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone serious about making a lasting impression. Book a session with Kevin, and you’ll not only get a headshot—you’ll get a masterpiece.

name: Pete Jones
comment: Kevin was very personable and friendly during the photoshoot!  Kevin did a great job!  Very pleased with the results!  Highly recommend Kevin if you need an updated photo!

name: Richard Hampton
comment: I am beyond happy with the results of my shoot with Kevin!  He really knows his stuff--from lighting to posing, to equipment and setting the mood, just a really top-rate experience.  HIGHLY recommended!!

name: Jonathan Rice
comment: Kevin was professional, thoughtful, and very helpful. Highly recommend.

name: Christine Yoon
comment: I decided it was time to get a professional career photo done and was introduced to Kevin last year through a coworker. I decided to bite the bullet and get it done. I did the full hair, makeup, and photo package. I had a wonderful session with Kevin - he was patient in instructing me on how I should pose and smile. I am happy with the results, and now use my photo everywhere that's work related. Highly recommend Kevin.

name: TristanAndAllie Bliesner
comment: Kevin is excellent to work with and makes the process of being shot into something fun.  we will definitely use his services again and again.

name: Silvia Neisler
comment: Kevin was wonderful to work with. This was my first time getting headshots done. He made me feel comfortable and listened when I shared what angles I wanted to see. He made me laugh and got some fantastic photos that I can’t wait to put all over LinkedIn.

name: Kristen Fyfe-Mills
comment: My session with Kevin was exceptional. He was the consummate professional and worked diligently to make sure I was giving my best so he could capture terrific images. I'm THRILLED with the head shots I received and highly recommend Kevin and his team!

name: Peter Arundel
comment: Kevin knows how to bring to life the natural personality of his clients who may otherwise feel uncomfortable or stiff in front of the camera.  I couldn't be more happy with the results!

name: Ama H
comment:
My experience with of Get a Head Shot was wonderful. From my initial touchpoint to the day of appointment was nothing short of professional and amazing. I received a phone call from Kevin (the owner) right after I booked my appointment on his website to explain the process and what to expect.  He followed up with and email of what we discussed, and a calendar invitation. I have worked with great photographers, but Kevin stands out- he's exceptional! You get to see the pictures as he takes then and so you are truly part of the session! I loved that!

I was met at outside with a welcome sign once I pulle into the driveway of the studio which was a lovely touch. Book an appointment to experience this!:)

The best part of it all is that Kevin is such a pleasure to work with.

I barely write Google reviews (I like to think that I am highly selective with them) but I had to write this one!

name: Rizwan Jan
comment: If you're seeking high-quality headshots or professional photography, look no further than Kevin. His expertise translates into a smooth, professional, and truly pleasant experience. I'm thrilled with the results, and my wife and her friends were so impressed that they're scheduling their own appointments. Kevin's work is outstanding!!! THANK YOU!

name: Elizabeth Gorz
comment: Kevin is a best-in-class headshot photographer. Kevin’s process is especially perfect for individuals that hate their photo being taken. You get to be part of the process and see your photos in realtime. Kevin then listen and coaches you through subtle expression changes that captured the real you. I highly recommend him.

name: Thalmus Thomas
comment: Where do I begin? Upon arrival, I already felt the love as I saw a personal greeting with my name near the driveway. Kevin welcomed me in and we conversed a wide range of topics. I never felt like "just another customer" as he genuinely wanted to know more about me. He then asked what I wanted to accomplish for the shoot and we proceeded into his studio. It was very relaxing and comfortable. He was personable, encouraging, funny, and accommodating. Even asked me what music to play during the session. I had so much fun that I actually wanted to hang out and just talk. I even learned a thing or two about cameras and setting shots up. Kevin is one of them ones. A good kind-hearted soul and someone I'm glad to have come across...

name: Chad Harbour
comment: You did a fantastic job. Professional. Timely. Experienced. I highly recommend you.

name: Lisa Spinelli
comment: I just had my headshots done with Kevin and it was a fantastic experience. Very thorough, personable and professional. It was great to get to know Kevin and I think he captured my personality in the photos. It was fun experience with lots of laughter. He was very attentitive and I loved being able to see the photos as they were taken. Highly recommend!

name: Joe Murray
comment: My experience with Kevin was very positive in many regards. First, it is clear he has invested in his practice via his equipment and the best practices of modern photography. Secondly, he invests in getting to know you, his client and make you feel at home at his studio. Lastly, his patience and interest to get your best photos is obvious. I highly recommend Kevin for your headshot and other photographic requirements.

name: Sherif Abdelkarim
comment: Get aHead Shot offers customers a fun experience that translates to stellar photographs. In the process of shooting, Kevin brings out the best of his clients, resulting in the most genuine yet professional photos you'll ever see, all at a reasonable price that reflects the value of the products received. Worth it!

name: Pam Bell
comment: Get aHead Shot photographer Kevin Elwell is truly remarkable and phenomenal!  His headshots have a high, professional quality that can be used for a variety of employment opportunities.  Our experience was wonderful as his personal expertise and knowledge helped capture polished and striking portraits.  I would highly recommend Kevin to friends, colleagues, and family as he made the entire headshot experience, which was new to us, an enjoyable one.  He went above and beyond as he devoted his time and effort into creating the best headshots.  Kevin’s advice is truly invaluable and his process for refining the selection is certainly efficient.  We hope to see him again in the future!

name: Christy Plunkett
comment:
I recently worked with Kevin for a professional headshot session, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience! Kevin was incredibly easy to work with, making the entire process smooth and stress-free.

Everything was handled efficiently, from scheduling the session to delivering the photos. He took the time to understand what I was looking for and offered great advice to help me feel comfortable and look my best in front of the camera.

The results are stunning! The headshots turned out even better than I had hoped, with perfect lighting and attention to detail. If you’re looking for a skilled and reliable photographer, I highly recommend Get Ahead Shot! You won’t be disappointed.

name: Princy Mathai
comment: Kevin is extremely professional, knows how to utilize lighting to maximize the pictures, helps you find the right background and provides an amazing headshot. Kevin really pays attention to detail and provides guidance whenever you need it. Our whole company has been photographed by Kevin and we highly recommend him!

name: Lanre O
comment: Kevin did a fantastic job. I was impressed with the quality of the images and his friendly demeanor throughout the session.

name: Kirsten Sutton
comment: I am a repeat client of Kevin’s and I can’t recommend him highly enough! Not only is he naturally talented, he also goes to great lengths to ensure he has the best equipment and most creative techniques to ensure your head shot makes you stand out from the crowd. Kevin worked with me to ensure that my personality and sense of style were captured in my headshot in a way that was authentic, without being distracting. I work for a large organization and do a lot of public speaking and regularly receive compliments on my headshot. Hire him!

name: Priyank Patel
comment: Kevin is an amazing photographer who will get you what you want. He spends quality time taking your pictures and he is best at it. This was my first time getting a head shot from a professional and it was definitely one to remeber due to Kevin's expertise. I would defenitely go back again and recommend others as well.

name: HongHanh Chau
comment: I am very happy with my pictures and highly recommend Kevin if you are in need of professionally taken headshots. He is a very professional and talented headshot photographer who will patiently coach you to get the best pictures.

name: morris family
comment: Kevin Elwell is a real professional.  He takes time to work with you as a client and he does amazing work.  I could not be happier with the headshots that he created for me, and I highly recommend his services.

name: Lydia Clark
comment: Wonderful session with Kevin and I am very happy with my new headshots!

name: Margie Wildblood
comment: I found Kevin Elwell on the internet when I needed a headshot for marketing my first book to be published. I appreciated that he had someone who would do my hair and make-up so that I looked my best, as I seldom wear much make-up or do more than wash and dry my hair. Mallory did a fabulous job and helped me feel my best. Kevin spent almost two hours taking photos of me in several different outfits. Then we reviewed them together and narrowed them down to what we thought were the best ones. He was knowledgeable about commercial licenses for photos and truly added information to my experience that I did not previously know. In several days, he provided me with gorgeous pictures that I plan to share with my family and friends, as well as use in marketing activities when my book is published. I appreciated his professionalism and how he made me feel relaxed during the shoot. I am so glad I chose him!

name: Deanna McNeil
comment: Kevin provides such a relaxed atmosphere, even the most self conscious person can't resist showing their smiles that he captures perfectly. Thanks Kevin!

name: Zac C
comment: Wonderful experience, Kevin made me feel comfortable and relaxed while also providing advice on some poses for my professional photos. Highly recommend

name: Haejung Shin
comment:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Kevin, and I cannot recommend him highly enough. Granted, my schedule has been hectic the past few months but Kevin was very patient and open to working around my schedule. From the moment we began the session, it was clear that I was in the hands of a true professional. He guided me through every step of the process with such ease and expertise that what could have been a stressful experience turned out to be incredibly enjoyable.

Kevin has an exceptional eye for detail and offered invaluable input throughout the shoot, ensuring that we captured the perfect shots. His ability to suggest the right angles, lighting, and poses made a significant difference in the final results. His calm and confident approach put me completely at ease, allowing my true personality to shine through in the photos.

The entire experience was seamless, and the final images exceeded all of my expectations. If you're looking for a photographer who combines professionalism with a genuine passion for his craft, look no further than Get aHead Shot. He truly knows how to bring out the best in his clients and create stunning, timeless photographs. I will recommend him to my peers for any headshot or photography needs!

name: Chris Meadows
comment:
I recently had a headshot session with Kevin and couldn’t be more pleased with the results. His consultative approach was outstanding; he guided me through expressions and wardrobe choices, ensuring that every detail aligned with my goals. Kevin’s coaching made the experience both enjoyable and productive.

The final images are truly works of art. Each shot captures not just my appearance but also my personality with incredible finesse. If you’re looking for a headshot that stands out and reflects your true self, I highly recommend Kevin for his exceptional skill and personalized service.

name: Kurt Krueger
comment:
What an extraordinary photographer. Exceeded all expectations. If you want it done right, work
with aHead.
Kevin Elwell is the best, bar none.

name: Stephen D
comment:
I had an absolutely outstanding experience with Kevin! From start to finish, the headshot session was beyond anything I had anticipated. He brought a level of professionalism and expertise that truly set him apart. I do not normally enjoy having my picture taken; however, Kevin not only made the entire process fun, he also managed to capture me at my absolute best. I was genuinely amazed at how they could make me look even better than I had imagined possible.

Kevin's skill in directing poses and utilizing lighting was remarkable, and his friendly, encouraging demeanor made me feel at ease throughout. It’s clear that he is a true expert in his craft, and his attention to detail is second to none. If you’re looking for a headshot photographer who combines top-notch expertise with a genuinely enjoyable experience, look no further. Highly recommend!

name: Andrew Kalukin
comment: I really enjoyed my photography session with Kevin and highly recommend this studio.  The setting was very comfortable and the tech is interesting.  Kevin got some very good shots -- and I don't normally like to have photos taken --  this was a really good experience.  All the instructions and the directions to the studio were nicely organized.

name: Lisa Andrews
comment: Everything about this experience was white glove, from the booking process and information about how to prepare for the photo shoot, all the way to choosing the photos right on the spot - no waiting - after the shoot was over. With just a few cues, Kevin elicited the most authentic, genuine responses from me - his gentle and empathetic manner translated to headshots that were beyond my expectations. He should be charging much more than he is for the phenomenal shots you will get! And his hair and makeup partner Mallory was equally impressive. 10 stars!

name: Greg Bergstedt
comment: Great experience!  Kevin came to our office, setup his studio and got great head shots of our Team.

name: Bob Kehoe
comment:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Kevin Elwell for a professional headshot, and I couldn't be more pleased with the results. From the moment I arrived, Kevin made me feel comfortable and at ease. His expertise and eye for detail were evident as he guided me through various poses, ensuring each shot was perfect.

What impressed me the most was his ability to capture the essence of my personality in the photos. He knew exactly how to position me to highlight my best features, and the final images were beyond my expectations. The entire session was enjoyable and efficient, and the turnaround time for receiving the edited photos was impressively quick.

If you're looking for a photographer who is skilled, professional, and a pleasure to work with, I highly recommend Kevin. He truly has a gift for capturing great headshots!

name: Andre Maugeri
comment: 5 STARS! From the moment I stepped into Kevin's studio, was met with a warm welcome and was provided a great overview of the shoot. His expertise in lighting, angles, and poses was evident. I always thought I didn't photograph well, but Kevin worked some magic that made me look great! The quality, clarity, and attention to detail with the photos were amazing and these headshots have really boosted my confidence. Highly recommend!

name: J D
comment: Kevin from Get A Head Shot is the only place you need to go for head shots and portraits.  My session with Kevin was professional and the results were excellent. He listened to my needs and he coached me through the photography.  His studio is well equipped and I fully recommend him.  He is the best!  Julian D.

name: Erin Kelley
comment:
Kevin is the consummate professional. His home studio was easy to find, super inviting and overall, the vibe eased my nerves.  His makeup/ hair artist (Mallory) was amazing and really listened to my desire to look as natural as possible.
Kevin is extremely knowledgeable about capturing the perfect lighting and various backgrounds that helped make my outfit pop.  He’s a real pro with a keen eye for a great shot.  In fact, he makes you feel so relaxed that before you know it, he had already taken a hundred photos without you blinking an eye.  His edits are beautiful and follows up until you are completely satisfied---even if it meant having to do a reshoot at no extra cost!  At the end of the day, it was a pleasure doing business with Kevin and I would recommend him to anyone and everyone looking for an image that truly displays YOU.

name: Walter Gilligan
comment: Kevin provided fantastic headshot services! He was very knowledgeable, gracious and highly professional. Strongly recommended photographer!

name: David Fleming
comment: Get Ahead Shot is an exceptional photography studio that consistently delivers outstanding results. Kevin Elwell is a highly skilled professional who creates a welcoming and pleasant environment that puts clients at ease. With a keen eye for detail and technical expertise, he captures stunning, high-quality headshots and portraits that truly make you stand out. The turnaround time is impressively fast, and the final images exceeded my expectations. Investing in Get Ahead Shot's services is undoubtedly worth it - you'll receive top-notch photos that boost your professional image and online presence. I highly recommend Get Ahead Shot for future photography needs.

name: Stephanie Rose
comment: Had a great experience working with Kevin! The pictures turned out so great, it was hard to decide which one to pick! The turn around time was very quick as well! Highly recommend!

name: Gary Jones
comment: Kevin is above being a professional as his photography and digital skills are exquisite and on point. Some people are talented and some people are blessed. Kevin is both blessed and talented in his passion for helping people project their best selves through his visual imagery. I don't normally make endorsements, but have to make exceptions for the quality of work and services that Kevin provides. No pun intended, you will not be disappointed so take a “Shot!”.

name: K D
comment: Kevin is an awesome guy! He has helped me with two of my headshots. He is very experienced and helps create a natural headshot! Highly recommend anyone who needs an amazing headshot!

name: Erin Hamm
comment: In addition to the pictures being fantastic, I loved how personable and responsive Kevin was. It was a great experience and am so delighted with my pictures!!!

name: Jason Cespedes
comment: I was long overdue for some quality headshots.  I'd been searching online for a while and found Kevin's website.  I was impressed with the photos that he had on his site so I went with him. He even taught me ways to pose to highlight certain features that stand out better in pictures.  The photos came out great and im very happy with the end result.  Top notch quality.  I highly recommend Kevin for any photo needs that you have.  You will not be disappointed.

name: Lonny N
comment: Kevin is exceptional and very enjoyable to work with.

name: Robert Brandau
comment: Kevin Elwell is terrific!

name: V. V.
comment: What a great experience! With fabulous results! Kevin Elwell is an excellent portrait photographer. From the first correspondence, and throughout, the level of kindness and professionalism never waned. I’ve always thought of myself as unphotogenic, until now!  I highly recommend his services.

name: Dave Pitts
comment: Kevin greatly exceeded my expectations with the results of our session. He really guided me through the session making this so easy.  I could not be happier with the results.  Kevin is a gifted professional.

name: Paule Valery Joseph
comment: I have had many professional photography done for different purposes therefore worked with many photographers and by far Kevin is the best. Kevin is an outstanding photographer whose passion and mastery of his craft truly shine through at Get aHead Shot. He creates a comfortable and creative atmosphere, making each session unique and tailored to the individual. His love for photography is evident as he captures the essence of his subjects, turning simple moments into magical memories. Supe attention to detail. He has a good eye. Kevin's coaching during the sessions makes even the most camera-shy feel like a model, with his tips on posing and expression enhancing the overall experience. His professionalism (which you can expect from the first email to the product) combined with a friendly demeanor, ensures an enjoyable session, resulting in stunning, high-quality images. He also has a wonderful team for professional hair and make up. if you're looking for a professional headshot Kevin is your guy no need to look further. He is very honest and in no given moment you will feel he is pushing a sell. His prices are also great for this market. Kevin is the photographer who will exceed your expectations with images you'll treasure. Highly recommended for anyone looking to get a headshot that stands out among the crowd!

name: Lane Copeland
comment: Stunning photos!  A headshot can be a particular thing and Kevin was very artistic while also very professional focused.  He was very keen on the details (such as wrinkled clothing, or anything unsymmetrical).  We did our full leadership suite headshots with Kevin and plan to continue sending our team there as it grows.

name: Michele Rambo
comment: I had Mallory do my hair and make-up, both of which were perfect. Kevin did a fantastic job with the headshots. He is easy to work with, and provides a great product that is very reasonable in price. I highly recommend using his studio for your headshots.

name: Jimmy Atassi
comment: Kevin was extremely easy to work with and provided an encouraging environment for me. I am not usually too fond of cameras but he allowed me to feel comfortable throughout the session. He provided me with helpful tips that I can use moving forward. After leaving the session, I truly felt welcome and encouraged to do it again and I mean that.  Thank you!

name: Bonnie Armstrong
comment:
The final headshot products speak for themselves. For me, they are AMAZING – and they are authentically me.

Kevin is super talented in his craft and setting the tone for the photo session. He talked to me as a friend, which eased my nerves before the session. He asked great questions to understand my needs and wants for my headshots.

It will be easy for me to send referrals/endorsements for Kevin. I am confident in his skills, attentiveness, and quality of final results.

name: Rick Vasquez
comment: Got a headshot for the first time and had a great experience with Kevin. Extremely happy with the results!

name: Jason Simek
comment: Working with Kevin was absolutely fantastic.  Kevin has a great setup, fantastic lighting, provides the best coaching, all while jamming out to classic rock. I was beyond pleased with the shots he took, that it was tough to just pick a few.  Kevin is passionate about his craft, it shows in his work, and I would highly recommend him!

name: Kevin Williams
comment:
I can’t say enough about Kevin’s photography and business !

The process from beginning to end was seamless. Communication for the appointments, expectations, and follow ups were straight forward and easy to digest. The photography session was great, Kevin did awesome with making me feel at ease with the session since being in front of a camera is something I’m not used to. And lastly, the final product is OUTSTANDING.

Anyone in the DC area looking for excellent headshots I highly recommend Kevin !

name: Shehzad Mohammed
comment: Working with Kevin for my headshot photography was an absolute delight! The session was smooth and effortless, much like a calm breeze on a sunny day. (View my profile picture for a non-edited headshot from Kevin)

name: Karen Wrightsman
comment: Kevin had great suggestions for how I posed, which led to the perfect shot!

name: Brandon Bormentar
comment: Kevin did a great job. He was very patient with me as we took a number a different photos to get great shots. He was very welcoming and makes you feel at home. I would definitely recommend Kevin for a head shot photo!

name: Melissa Panagides
comment: It was so wonderful to work with Kevin Elwell for my head shots. I was grateful that he was able to accommodate my need to turn them around quickly. He was easy to work with, did a great job coaching me through the process and even recommended and EXCELLENT professional  hair and makeup artist (ask for Mallory).  I would highly recommend Kevin for professional headshots.

name: Craigery
comment: Beyond expectations! Kevin’s work for my colleagues, and myself has been exceptional. He’s a professional that manages to get the right angle to take a most flattering photograph.  If you don’t have a headshot, Kevin is hands down one of the best!

name: Brian Kelly
comment: Kevin was a pleasure to work with throughout the process.  His professionalism, personable coaching style, and insightful, nuanced perspective create a comfortable, and enjoyable photo session experience.  The photos were excellent. I highly recommend Kevin and GetaHeadShot to anyone seeking high-quality, professional headshots!

name: Amozi Niamke-Bervell
comment: I had a fantastic experience working with Kevin Elwell for my first professional headshots. He truly captured my personality and the essence of what I wanted to convey. His attention to detail and creative direction made the shoot enjoyable and relaxed. The final photos exceeded my expectations, and I couldn't be happier with the results. I highly recommend Kevin for anyone seeking high-quality and personalized photography.

name: T
comment:
The experience working with Kevin from start to finish has been pleasant and well-coordinated.

From our first conversation, Kevin helped me feel comfortable and an active participant in the process. Leading up to the shoot date, he patiently and consistently follows up with plenty of reminders to ensure busy professionals don’t forget about the appointment.

His studio is spacious and comfortable with a large private changing area. The area the studio is located has plenty of safe parking.

Kevin has an encouraging and  positive disposition throughout length of the shoot. He is constantly providing gentle and appropriate feedback, suggestions and corrections. He is willing to listen to learn what you want, not listen to respond. He is constantly trying to marry your vision with his job to give you both the experience want and need.

My experience was and still is fantastic. Once the shoot was completed and I received my photos, he has done a check-ins or two to ensure I’m happy with the finished product.

I don’t know how to end this but to say Kevin is a true professional, customer service expert and good human being. I will happily be purchasing from him again very soon.

name: Angela B D
comment: I would recommend Kevin to anyone who is looking for a highly skilled professional headshot photographer.  He is personable and super talented. I must admit that I am not very keen on taking photos, but I will gladly say, I enjoyed every moment of being photographed by Kevin. His warm personality and demeanor helped make this process a genuinely enjoyable experience. He provided a calm environment that relieved all anxiety. He is detailed-oriented and considered my thoughts and opinions to create absolutely amazing headshots. I can’t believe how many great flattering shots there were.  He captured the natural expression to perfection! Overall, a truly amazing experience and an investment that you will not regret.

name: Malik Weeks
comment: I highly recommend Kevin's photo services for his excellent attention to detail and helpful, down-to-earth approach. He provides great service.

name: Andrea Key
comment: Kevin does a great job and the finished product is outstanding.  The session was fun and relaxed... definitely exceeded my expectations on all accounts.

name: Eda Martinez
comment: I am so glad that I chose Kevin for my professional headshot. He did a phenomenal job during the session. The process was smooth from beginning to end. Choosing the final photos was challenging. He did such an incredible job. I highly recommend recommend his services. Kevin was very professional, understanding and courteous.

name: Dan P
comment: Kevin was an absolute joy to work with! From our initial contact, to when he reached out to provide in the finished product, Kevin was nothing but a professional, friendly expert in his field. I could not be more impressed with the results. Kevin took the time to get to know me personally, my business, and my goals so that he could provide the best guidance possible, when determining what poses and wardrobe choices would best suit my needs. Hands-down, I would recommend anyone I know work with Kevin. Thank you!

name: Travis Murphy
comment:
I strongly dislike, selfies and pictures of myself, always finding something to criticize. However, I could find nothing wrong with more than 30 of the photos Kevin took of me, making the most difficult part of the day deciding which ones to keep.

Kevin does a great job of sitting down and getting to know you and for what you're going to use the photos and makes you feel good about being in a staged situation. I'm now approaching him about doing photos for all my staff. Cannot recommend enough.

name: D. M.
comment: I was in desperate need of a last minute headshot. Kevin provides a service that goes beyond expectations. The session was professional, fun and quick. Definitely going to keep Kevin for all my future pictures!!

name: Ryan San Nicolas
comment: Words in this recommendation won’t do Kevin justice but I will try! We hired Kevin to take commercial/acting headshots for my 10yo twin girls who are aspiring actresses. An obvious professional, but it was his interactions and suggestions to them that I believe sets him apart. He was welcoming, patient, motivating, and even played BTS in the background for the girls to get them comfortable. This was their first experience with headshots, but my wife and I agree that we will be regular clients! I highly recommend his services but be prepared because you will want to buy every single photo!

name: Amber Beebe
comment: Kevin was amazing! I went in feeling pretty awkward. This was my first time getting a head shot. Kevin was super easy to talk to and made me feel so comfortable. He gave me some much needed tips on how to pose and I was able to see each picture instantly after each shot. He took his time, was very detailed and I had such a good time. He said these would be the best pictures ever and he was 100% right. If you are looking for a brilliant and fantastic photographer, do yourself a favor and go see Kevin. I promise you won’t regret it!

name: Philippe Futa
comment:
Working with Kevin was pleasurable and such a great experience. I'm 100% satisfied with my pictures :-)
So, to my fellow attorneys, coaches, consultants, and business owners... If you're looking for an experienced top-rated headshot photographer, I would highly recommend Kevin. He is professional, passionate, friendly, and great to work with.

name: Winnie Grim
comment: Kevin was fantastic! I needed updated headshots for a new position. He responded quickly, created amazing photos, and provided very fast turnaround. All-around a wonderful experience. I highly recommend.

name: Karen Irish
comment: Kevin Elwell of Get aHead Shot is phenomenal!  And his Hair & Makeup artist, Mallory Dreyer, is exceptional, too!  Super professional and approachable. They made the entire experience relaxed, easy, and fun!  Yep, this coming from the girl who hates getting her picture taken and typically likes the results even less.  Not this time, 'though. Kevin knows his technical stuff, but also knows how to coach you to get the best and most natural images. I couldn't recommend Kevin and Get aHead Shot more highly.

name: Larry J Davis
comment:
This was the best photography session I ever experienced!
When you arrive, Kevin takes the time to make you feel comfortable and get to know you before the session begins. That allowed him to bring out my personality in my photos. Kevin absolutely knows how to coach you to bring out the best “you”. Initially, I wondered if I was overspending for this service, but you absolutely get what you pay for… I was very satisfied with the result! His crew did an excellent job touching up any blemishes, he far exceeded my expectations, and he delivered my final pictures way ahead of the expected delivery date. If you’re like me and need a professional, more than a mere “picture-taker”, I highly recommend Kevin!

name: Kerensa Green
comment: Kevin is amazing! I have never felt so comfortable and confident during a photoshoot. Kevin was able to get so many great shots and in a short amount of time. I am extremely happy with my pictures and his work is phenomenal! If I could give him 10 stars, I would!

name: Margaret Miller
comment:
Kevin, what a great time I had today! Mallory worked her charm on my hair and makeup. Your set up, in which I can immediately review every shot you've taken and choose the best ones, was efficient, engaging and left me feeling confident about the choices I made. Working with you and Mallory made my day.
Margaret A. Miller

name: Douglas Martin Levermore
comment: Kevin is personable, professional and very good at his craft  I enjoyed this session profusely and would do it again  two thumbs up!

name: n.1 c
comment: Kevin did my headshot for my LinkedIn. This is an incredible service, professional, amazing lighting, exemplary customer service skills and epic experience.

name: Mike
comment: Are you one of those people who swears they've never taken a decent photograph in their lives? I was. If you are too, Kevin is the guy to see! Through the keen eye of a skilled portrait photographer, all the right equipment, a love for his work, a relaxed studio setting, and the desire to get "one more shot" that's even better than all the rest, Kevin will deliver what you thought was impossible - your picture, true to life and better than ever. One you'll be proud to share.

name: Marva Gordon
comment:
The brilliant work by Kevin Elwell - from arrangement to preparation to ancillary services and the energy with which Kevin worked- produced such fabulous yet professional photographs that it was not easy to choose the final set for my portfolio.

Great value.

You will not have any regrets - just know he works you - hard!!

name: Mark Goldman
comment: Great photo session with Kevin. Highly recommended for his expertise. Expect great results!

name: Lesley Perkins
comment: I have used Get aHead Shot three times over the past few years. My photos from Kevin have always hit the spot. He is a wonderful photographer and has a true gift at taking headshots. Highly recommend him.

name: Debbie Wuthnow
comment: Kevin took time to understand my needs and get to know me before taking any photos.  He did a great job in making sure it was ME that shined and nothing else distracted from the image.  He had lots of options for background and his lighting was superb.  It was a wonderful experience and I'm very pleased with the result.

name: Gary Johnson
comment: Kevin is a very talented photographer who knows how make you feel at ease to take the best photos possible

name: Krishna Kondapalli
comment: Very good experience with Kevin. Would definitely recommend his services to anyone.

name: Lisa Medici
comment: Kevin made the headshot process quick and painless. His website has helpful tips for what to wear and he did a great job of talking me through the process. I walked away from the session with a wonderful updated headshot that I truly like.

name: Karen Kondapalli
comment: Wonderful experience getting our headshots done with Kevin.

name: Courtney Tolson
comment: Kevin was tremendously awesome to work with! I truly enjoyed his studio very much. He's fully equipped with the best technology on the market and his cameras are phenomenal. He will coach you up on how to pose to create the best photo possible. The end result, the photo's came out amazing! I would highly recommend Kevin to anybody looking to get a headshot done. Thank you for the awesome session!

name: Antoine Lareges
comment: Great experience, Outstanding pictures ! I definitly recomend.

name: Kristin Yanulites Horn
comment: My photos turned out great and Kevin was fantastic to work with. Not only does he take an excellent photo but his warm and engaging personality put me at ease and made me very comfortable. Hands down the best professional photos I've ever had. He gives good direction and you can see the results in real time to make adjustments and get the best photo for you. Thanks Kevin!

name: Ari Snaevarsson
comment: Kevin is superb. His friendliness, expertise, and professionalism speak for themselves. I am pretty self conscious of how I look in pictures, but the picture we ended up going with came out phenomenal. Worth every dollar!

name: Scott McClanahan
comment:
Great experience!  Kevin was awesome.

Extremely happy with the outcome!!

name: Veronica Garcia
comment: Kevin is very professional, also he is patient with his clients and does his best to get the picture you want. I highly recommend him.

name: Brendan Monaghan
comment: Kevin's fantastic at making the headshot process smooth, efficient and even fun.  His work is terrific and the output was beyond my expectations.  I'd happily recommend Kevin to anyone in my network.

name: Adam Langborgh
comment:
I am so pleased with my Get aHead Shot photos. See the attached results for yourself.

I suffer from partial facial paralysis that gives me a crooked smile and blue eyes that squint in bright light. Yet after all was done, I obtained 2 wonderful professional photographs, a business formal and business semi-formal shot, that will serve me well going into my post military civilian career.  I could not be happier.

Beyond the great photos, I am very pleased with the experience I had.  Get aHead's photographer, Kevin Elwell, immediately put me at ease with his relaxed personality and professionalism.  Kevin gave me plenty of time to get used to the photo lights and allowed us to practice poses that flattered my appearance and built my confidence.  I was also very impressed with his systematic method to narrow down the ~50 photo to the very best two.  I could not believe how efficient and effective his method was!

Check out my pictures and Get aHead Shot.  I think you will agree

name: Linsey Hernandez
comment: Kevin was amazing, a true talent, and professional. So happy I decided to get my head shot done by him. 10/10 recommend!

name: Amina Gray
comment: Kevin was super professional and friendly right from the start! He was very patient with me when I had to reschedule our informational call and when I asked plenty of questions. The photo session ended up being about 3 hours long, but it was so fun that time flew by! Kevin made the session fun, relaxed, and informative. He coached me on looks, we found my favorable side easily, I switched outfits, he had me make silly faces and see them on the screen to capture my genuine smiles. Finally, the photos themselves...they were absolutely gorgeous. My company only paid for one photo, but I couldn't resist getting a couple more just for myself, out of pocket. It was extremely difficult to say goodbye to the rest of them, as they were all so amazing. Kevin was really great at both taking the pictures and retouching them. The equipment he uses is also fantastic. When I need headshots again in the future, I will definitely go back to him. Absolutely no regrets!

name: Ping McKenna
comment: I have to pass on all the complimentary remarks that I have received on the skill of the photographer who did my headshot. Plus, many people have reached out to me because of my headshot. At that moment and your skill at releasing the essence of the person, I think you capture or record that window into a person's soul. The beauty shines forth from the soul. Thank you.

name: Cheryl Howarth
comment: My recent photo shoot  with Kevin Elwell was a very delightful experience!  I normally don't like having my photo taken, but Kevin is very skillful in capturing just the right shot at just the right moment.  He also has a unique method for helping you select the final shots.  We were able to whittle down my final pictures from 63 to 4 in just a matter of a few minutes.  It was amazing!  If you're thinking of updating your profile photos, whether it be for work or social media, I would highly recommend that you go to Kevin.  You won't be disappointed!

name: Dylan Baker
comment: Kevin made it super easy to get a great headshot for job applications. I was less than excited to get in front of the camera but he made it a much more relaxed session than I expected and ended up getting some really good shots. He was also really good about understanding what I wanted and geared the session and the wardrobe changes towards that end.

name: Mala McMaster
comment: Kevin went out of his way to accommodate a last-minute request from me for a same-day Saturday afternoon appointment.   He has a friendly disposition and is clearly a very skilled photographer!

name: Charlotte Nteireho
comment: Kevin is the best person to work with. He brought out the best photo possible.

name: Nigel Walker
comment: I never knew you could have so much fun taking the same picture over and over and over again, but Kevin made it an experience! Plus, the results were amazing! He’s both very talented behind the camera as well as post processing. The final product exceeded all my expectations. Thank you Kevin!

name: David Chun
comment: I am pleased with the results. I recommend this company.

name: Greg Langlois
comment: Kevin was great to work with.  He was able to put me at ease in front of the camera and we wound up with some great professional photos.

name: Abha Gupta
comment: Kevin, owner of Get aHead Shot, was fantastic!  He was very professional and knowledgeable.  He has a great studio with state of the art equipment.  The session was quick but resulted in some great shots that I could utilize for my company as well as for social media and a board resume.  I would definitely recommend going to Kevin for your headshot and photography needs.

name: Chae Kim
comment: Kevin is super personable and wants to get to know you, the person, before he gets his camera to know you.  I think this is a great way for him to get a sense of what you'd like to evoke or express through your head-shot.  He's really patient and has you test several poses to find the right shot.  And he's very willing to work with you until you find a photo that you're completely satisfied with.  Thanks, Kevin!

name: Ana Branco
comment: I was so pleased with my session and final photographs. He was instantly able to put me at ease, and capture some captivating photographs.

name: Deborah Leben
comment: Fully equipped to take clear and crisp photos to meet your needs. Great tips on how to get the most out of each pose.  Quick turnaround time.

name: Eric Newton
comment:
Kevin presents a balance of professionalism and friendliness. He has honed his craft and will work with you to find the head shot that is not only polished, but makes you look great. Loved the experience.

Eric N.
CEO

name: Andrya Clark
comment: Kevin is very friendly and committed to great service. He takes the time to get to know you and works to ensure that your headshots truly represent you. I couldn't be happier with the results.

name: Chip Doering
comment: Kevin was very easy to work with; clearly professional and upbeat!!  Thanks again, Kevin!!

name: Jonathan Knight
comment: Outstanding.  Highly recommended!

name: KC Burzio
comment: Professional and responsive from my first point of contact.  Provided an excellent variety of resources in preparing for the photo session including recommendations on attire, make-up and hair.   Patient and persistent in capturing just the right images.  Very easy to work with.  Definitely provided the images that I was looking to obtain.  Easy recommendation to make.

name: Stacy Flax
comment: Kevin did an outstanding job taking the photographs I needed for my new company. I'm thrilled with the end result! He was easy to work with and just really talented. If you're thinking about a session with Kevin, just do it! You won't regret it!

name: Nina Coolidge
comment: Had an amazing experience with Kevin - very easy process and wonderful photos!

name: Matt Swayhoover
comment: A recently had the opportunity to have Kevin take a few professional headshots. Kevin worked to put me at ease, managed to get a natural smile and worked efficiently. I was pleased with the final result. I look forward to returning at a future date for an extended session.

name: Betsy Anderson
comment: Kevin is a master!  I was so impressed by the ease with which he captured my image for an updated headshot. I am so appreciative of his talents and encourage you to work with him!

name: Stephen Edwards
comment: This was awesome, Kevin put me and the nervous person before me right at ease.  He was patient and his setup allowed for instant reviews which for bad photos he used to point out how to correct

name: elise D
comment: Did an amazing job! Helped me with poses and my photo came out amazing! I would definitely work with him again!

name: Beth Knight
comment: Kevin not only took a beautiful photo, he works with each person to maximize their best features. Also gives you tips and tricks to hide your less wonderful attributes. I would highly recommend using Kevin’s services for professional headshots and all other occasions.

name: Lourdes Parry
comment: Kevin is an artist, and it was a pleasure to have this session with him. He made me feel very relaxed and comfortable. He connected immediately with me after asking few questions; he knew exactly what I needed. I am very satisfied with the quality of the results and his professionalism

name: Tom Edwards
comment: Kevin has a professional studio and the process couldn't have been easier. He was patient and gave us great advice to get the best photos possible.

name: John W.
comment: Over the past several months I’ve seen connections with great headshot pics. So good, I made an appointment for my own with Kevin Elwell at Get Ahead Shot and took the trip to Tyson’s Corner to get it done. Worth. Every. Penny. And the time! I can’t believe how well this turned out. I commend Kevin and his work to all. I could never get a good shot by myselfie. Trust me on that. Kevin knows people and knows how to capture perfect shot. Totally commend to all!

name: Roma Brodecki
comment: Kevin is a great headshot photographer. He put me at ease making it seem effortless when in fact, he puts in extra effort to be the best picture possible.

name: Eugene Nkomba
comment: Purposeful, empathetic, and dependable. Kevin is the embodiment of a life lived in service to others. I wholeheartedly recommend him

name: Kathi Gagliano
comment: As someone who is terrified of the camera, I was not the easiest person to work with. Kevin was patient, encouraging, and made the experience as painless as possible. The pic turned out better than I had hoped and I would whole heartedly recommend Kevin for your head shot!

name: Jerry Jones
comment: From the moment I met Kevin Elwell-just wanting a social media headshot, his focus was about meeting my expectations and teaching me what other options might be available-full body shot, casual, business etc.  He provides a "Prep" planning so you know what colors work and what wardrobe options you might want to consider/rule out.  Upon arrival at his studio, he has a sit-down review of expectations to make sure he is aware of any changes.  Kevin is not hesitant to "pose" you for best results.  I do not consider myself photogenic and think my grin is better than my smile.  I REALLY enjoyed the photos I received and my family/friends have helped rank them, with difficulty, but many prefer the shots with full smiles.  I cannot thank Kevin enough for the quality, value and overall professionalism.  Kevin's caring is further demonstrated by his giving back to his community offering his services to help others in need.  Thank you, Kevin, personally and for our community.

name: Kelly
comment: This was my first experience getting a professional headshot and Kevin immediately put me at ease with his warm demeanor, professionalism, and extensive expertise in his craft. He connected me to an exceptional makeup and hair artist so I was able to feel confident and look my best. I had so much fun working with Kevin! I was struct by his attention to detail and clear instructions and suggestions on what looks best. I tried several different outfits and he was able to be creative with different colors and angles. I trusted his judgment completely and I think the quality of his work shines through the images he created for me. I can't recommend him enough. Thank you Kevin!

name: Mallory LaBoy
comment: Kevin was a delight to work with. I was nervous at first but he put me at ease right away and captured some amazing shots. He was so encouraging which helped me feel confident during the shoot, which obviously showed in my pictures. I also loved how his work was precise yet creative. If you are looking for professional headshots, I highly recommend going to him. He provided high quality photos that I am proud to share, and the whole experience was so fun!

name: Jason Brown
comment: Kevin is incredible at his profession. From the very moment I stepped into his studio, his confidence and competence was immediately obvious. I admit that I wasn't that excited about getting my picture taken, but Kevin made it easy and reassured me along the way. His ability to explain what he was doing and why was very helpful throughout the process and it felt like a very collaborative effort which resulted in a couple of fantastic headshots!

name: Megan Yu
comment: Kevin is outstanding and his photography skills really show through. I am pleased and satisfied with the way my picture turned out, and I do believe his work can greatly improve your social image. His professionalism and photography skills will blow you away!

name: John Yu
comment: Kevin did a fantastic job of taking my headshot.  He’s a top notch photographer and a great person to work with.  I highly recommend anyone who is looking to update their headshot to give Kevin a call.

name: Becky Steindorf
comment: Kevin is a talented professional and I’m thrilled with my photo. I was nervous before getting my picture taken but Kevin immediately put me at ease. He explained how to pose, and why, to get a natural shot. He eliminated any hint of glare from my glasses. Most importantly, he captured a genuine smile. I recommend Kevin to anyone who wants a high quality head shot.

name: Queen E
comment: Kevin is really fun to work with, he takes pride in his work, he will work with you to find the best angle and aims to please. For a clean, quality headshot, I would highly recommend his services.

Kevin Elwell is a terrific headshot photographer.  He's extremely professional in his demeanor, his knowledge of his equipment and techniques is very clear.  He makes the task of getting effective headshots so easy through his easy-going nature and great conversation.  It's been a real pleasure to deal with him through this process.  Thank you, Kevin, for making this so easy and enjoyable!

name: Doriann Apice
comment: Just had my head shot taken. Kevin was wonderful, professional and talented. I don’t always come out well in photos. He came up with some great shots in no time at all. He knew exactly how set up the lighting and most importantly to coach me to get a great shot. I highly recommend using  Get ahead Shot.

name: Debi Cain
comment: Kevin’s work is top shelf. He’s extremely talented at capturing your most authentic self, which is exactly what I was looking for in a professional headshot!

name: Larry Dominguez
comment: I met Kevin years ago through Career Network Ministries and I reconnected again with him at Career Confidence this past Friday.  At the time, he was volunteering his services to provide professional headshots for LinkedIn.  I do not photograph easily.  Kevin put me at ease and took a great photo that I was still using until today. He took an updated photo for me on Friday, and once again, he did a great job!

name: Mike Doon
comment: Kevin did  a great job on my Head Shot.  Very Professional.

name: Greg Foster
comment: Kevin is a great photographer. He knew just how to coach me on how to position my body and head and how to smile for a great professional photo that shows I’m serious but also inviting. The photo turned out extremely well.

name: Marc Zalaskus
comment: Professional, inviting, excellent customer service--highly recommend! I had a great experience and I'm really happy with my photos.

name: Kathleen Regan Mills
comment:
From a furloughed employee

Kevin donated his time to take professional headshots for individuals who lost their jobs or were furloughed due to COVID19. I was really appreciative of Kevin donating his time.

It has always been challenging to get a good picture of myself because I blink so often in photos. I close my eyes in pictures so often that when I got married my husband hired a sports photographer to take our wedding pictures. My goal was to get a good headshot without my eyes closed.

Kevin may not be a sports photographer, but he was amazing. He explained how I needed to stand in order to have defined chin line and how to look confident and engaging. In addition, he played with the flash setting until he was easily able to get several photos of me with my eyes open and smiling at the same time.

The whole experience was great. Now I can update my LinkedIn profile picture from 2004 and I can use a lot of his tips about body language when I interview. Thanks Kevin!

If you need a photographer Kevin is great.

name: Sue Anne Cassidy
comment: Kevin's friendly, gracious personality put me at ease right away at our appointment. His photography skill, combined with his coaching on position and expression, quickly resulted in two headshots that I love! Kevin's talent and encouragement made our session a pleasure. I highly recommend him.

name: Caroline Hurley
comment: Kevin Elwell patiently took a great headshot for me.

name: Chris Scott
comment: Appreciate Kevin. Easy to work with. Very professional. Patient

name: Ashley Evans
comment: Kevin is fantastic! I needed a basic headshot and I always have trouble taking good photos. Kid you not he got an amazing shot in just the first take! Super professional, great personality, you should totally book him!

name: Ikey
comment: Knows his stuff! Great fun while taking care of professional business

name: Robert Sim
comment:
It was my best professional headshot experience
Kevin was funny and precise at giving the perfect directions for a great photo

name: A
comment: Kevin is amazingggg!!!! He is THE nicest guy and so calm and soothing -- he made me feel at ease instantly (and I can be anxious about photos) and gives off a really wonderful vibe that I felt so comfortable with. He provided direction in a gentle way and was extremely positive and gave much-needed confidence :) I would HIGHLY RECOMMEND Kevin to anyone looking for a great, no-pressure/no-rush experience with AWESOME results (if I do say so myself!) I'll actually be booking him for additional shoots and projects in the near future I think. THANK YOU KEVIN!!!!! 🙏🙏🙏

name: Laila K
comment: What a great experience! They really made me feel very comfortable in front of the camera. I usually hate getting my picture taken, but I love how he was able to capture my personality, too.

name: LEE WARD
comment: This was the best photo shoot in my 30 years of doing professional head shots.  Very relaxing and absolutely easy to work with.  I highly recommend anyone looking to get the best photo they can, to use them.  I am beyond thrilled.  Thank you so much.  I truly appreciate the time, attention, and skills you displayed capturing this!

name: Korinne DeSio
comment: Kevin was amazing!  1st Professional photo I’ve ever liked. What a fantastic event to help those of us get back to work! Thank you!

name: Pete Waring
comment: Working with Kevin was absolutely wonderful. He is an excellent photographer, an expert at capturing just the right headshot, and is a true pleasure to work with. I absolutely recommend him to anyone looking for a great experience and results!

name: Saul Isakower
comment: Kevin is extremely patient with his subject matter and he produces top quality work.  I can recommend him without reservation.  If you are looking for someone to take your headshot, or other pictures, you will not go wrong by using Kevin.  I have had the pleasure of several sittings with Kevin over the years and he is very professional, and at the same time, brings you to life and makes you feel at ease!

name: Dan Stine
comment: Kevin Ewell is a great headshot photographer. He made me look better than I really do. He worked with my teenage son, an aspiring musician, and used his instrument as an engaging prop. He was professional and fun and the results were really good. We have used those photos for quite some time now. I highly recommend Kevin.

name: jenise birks
comment: I am excited to say I had an opportunity to be the object of his perfection....and I am ecstatic I had that opportunity! He was patient, kind, and kept going until he got the shot he was looking for. Only then did he ask if his subject was satisfied with the product. Working with Kevin was a gift!

name: Jahmaal Marshall
comment: I would never give 5 stars to any scenario or business where I didn't have a great experience.  Kevin is extremely even-tempered in a manner that puts his clients at ease and allows them to relax.  This is key in photography, as anxiety can come across one's face (even in professional photography).  While he is easy going, Kevin remains the consummate professional.  His professionalism was not only beneficial in producing an incredible picture, but his work was also memorable for two other members of my family as well. Kreative DEsigns receives my highest endorsement. Feel free patronize this business, you wont regret it.

name: Eileen
comment: Kevin is very professional and expert at taking a quality head shot. I was very nervous and he made me laugh then caught the moment my laugh went to a genuine smile. It was a fun, easy experience resulting in an awesome professional head shot that I was able to upload to my LinkedIn profile. I have received numerous, positive comments on the picture. I highly recommend Kevin to anyone desiring a professional head shot.

name: T.R. Elass
comment: Kevin quickly created a personal connection with me at the start, which subsequently made the photo shoot time pass quickly and successfully.  End results exceeded my expectations for a high-quality, professional headshot -- I enthusiastically recommend his services!

name: Christopher Gundersen
comment: I hired Kevin’s services for my first professional headshot and couldn’t have asked for a better experience!  He was thorough, detailed, and engaging in his approach.  He also was creative in his ability to take the best headshot tailored strictly for me.  Kevin is true professional - I highly recommend Kevin if your seeking a photographer to facilitate your effort to brand yourself and put the best foot forward!

name: Sheila Martinez
comment: Although only a novice actor I have used the professional head shots Kreative DEsigns made for me a number of times when putting in for roles.  I've already had a fellow actor ask where she can go to get head shots like mine.  The professional expertise and artistic skills of the photographer were only second to his true desire to show me in the best possible light.  When discussing the shoot, the photographer seemed to read my mind, answering my questions before I asked them.  I was totally impressed during the process, the quick turnaround and the final product.  When updating my head shots I will be heading back to K. DEsigns.

name: Veaceslav Pituscan
comment: Awesome.

name: Vince Chu
comment: Kevin was excellent. He spent time by taking multiple shots for me; we then looked, and discussed which one was the best one in our opinion. We both agreed upon the same shot - the last one. I highly recommend Kevin for any of your photo needs.

name: Alexander Covell
comment: Kevin does a great job with headshots. If you are looking for a professional photo, this is your guy!

name: Kosta Augoustidis
comment: Kevin was fantastic a true professional with great pricing and great equipment I say that because photography is one of my top hobbies..  I asked him questions about his equipment and he did not mind which is great.

name: Laura Hollister Fenton
comment: Kevin took his time getting to know me and my aspirations, before taking even a single photo. Then he took his time to study each shot he took, before taking another. When he finally invited me to take a look at the third photo, after he studied that one carefully also, I was stunned to see that he'd captured -- my best self!

name: Ewonou Aziakonou
comment: Kreative Designs took the best picture that was ever taken of me. Thank you

name: Andrey Shestakov
comment:
Kevin did a great, and professional picture of mine!
Thanks Kevin.

name: Veronica Campbell
comment: I had the pleasure to meet Kevin D. Elwell, he took a beautiful professional picture. Kevin and his team are extremely kind and have a great eye for taking wonderful pictures. I recommend Kevin for any occasion.

name: Tim Pelczar
comment: Kevin made the experience meaningful and the results were incredible. Thanks again!

name: Elizabeth Malavathu
comment: I had the opportunity to work with Kevin to get business professional photos taken and it was a wonderful experience. The photos turned out beautifully and he had them available to me very quickly. I highly recommend him!
